sections.paragraph:
Original: בּטה בּטא

Transliteration: bâṭâ' bâṭâh

Phonetic: baw-taw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to speak rashly or angrily, speak thoughtlessly
    1. (Qal) one that babbles, speaks rashly (participle)
    2. (Piel) to speak rashly, unadvisedly

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 232

Part(s) of speech: Verb
